title: RIGI ATPase Assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5blda","text":"Protocol for in vitro testing of RIG-I ATPase activity","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"asb4i","text":"For 10x Buffer:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cqdqb","text":"1 M HEPES (Thermofisher, 15630080)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c5cqq","text":"5 M NaCl (Thermofisher, A57006)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2jep1","text":"50 mM MgCl2 (Sigma Aldrich, M8787)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":10,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3qvg2","text":"Nuclease Free H2O","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":15,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ej2kb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5vtr6","text":"RIG-I (Abcam, ab132502)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7ubl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2lcpu","text":"White 96 well plate (Millipore Sigma, MSSWNFX40)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"75rip","text":"0.6 mL PCR tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4s33m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fup9g","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mix components in a 0.6 mL PCR tube: 6 µL of nuclease Free H20 1 µL of 10 millimolar (mM) ATP 1 µL of 10x ATPase Assay Buffer 1 µL of IVT RNA 1 µg/µL 1 µL of RIG-I
Make 10x ATPase Sample Buffer: HEPES 100 millimolar (mM) NaCl 1.5 Molarity (M) MgCl 2 10 millimolar (mM)
For making 1 mL 10x ATPase sample buffer, mix: 100 µL of 1 Molarity (M) HEPES 300 µL of 5 Molarity (M) NaCl 200 µL of 50 millimolar (mM) MgCl 2 400 µL of H 2 O
As controls, replace either the IVT RNA or RIG-I with H 2 O.
Incubate the reaction at 37 °C for 01:00:00 in a thermocycler.
Remove reaction from thermocycler and add 40 µL of H 2 O. Then transfer 50 µL of mixture to a well of a white 96-well plate.
Add 50 µL of Cell-Titer Glo 2 mixture and incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00
Measure luciferase activity within each well with 2 second gain.
creator: Carolina Lopez
